title: The Funny SlideShow mod
description: idk its just a mod about random stuff from the Funny SlideShow I made with my friend
body:
IDK this is just some funny stuff from the Funny SlideShow me and my friend made 

(would recomend using JEI)

**Adds**

**Mobs** - 44 wolf, Supe Notgoofy Ahh, Spongebee

**Boss** - Evil Sientist(cant spawn), Spongebee King(cant spawn), 44 Wolf King,(go to bottom to find how to spawn)

**Mini Boss** - Spongeball(cant spawn)

**biom** - the ungoofy ahh evil sientist, Spongebee invasion, The 44 Biom

**Dimension** - Dimension of the Evil Sientist 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad6a5796e0c4aac8c6b715339686f5473ab2bca4.png)

Spongebee invasion dimension
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b2603eecc844bb22cb2695d61687ec38afafe31.png)

44 dimesion
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc56269cf974278399a29071b92f33359e211f6f.png)

**wood/tree** - ungoofy ahh wood
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f31073464e6f5924f1193899bfd935160867b64.png)

Spongebee invasion wood

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0302ba79be336d66e8e5b1199893e09878b1bbcf.png)

**Stones**- Ungoofy Ahh Stone

**ore** - Goofy Ahh Crystal
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1386dc8b724cacf26941a316df47269f9d259254.png)

44 ore/44 Crystal

**ingredients** -  Ungoofy Ahh Crystal

**armor/tools** - Goofy Ahh armor/tools, Ungoofy Ahh Stone tools, The Clasic Funny SlideShow Shield, Spongebee Kings Sword, 44 chestplate, Wolf 44 mask

**Structures** - Ungoofy Ahh Outpost Tower, Spongebee Hive, Wolf 44 castle, wolf 44 portal

**Random** - Ungoofiest Gun (drops from Evil Sientist), Ungoofy Ahh Lazerbeam, The Funny SlideShow Music, Mysterios Ungoofy Ahh Fruit, Block of wolf 44, castle block(stair,slab,wall)

**testing/unfinished** - Emerald Frisby, Goofy Ahh Crafter, 

**HOW TO SPAWN BOSSES** - use summoner block

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dd1426511b7a36ecb2bd421cb5d4c53295e4ce5.png)

to spawn Evil Scientist - right click with level 4 key card (cant get)

to spawn Spongeball - right click with level 2 key card (cant get)

to spawn Spongebee King - right click with special honey 

to spawn 44 Wolf King - right click with The 44 Dimension igniter
